Welcome to our Support Center! Before opening a ticket, please take a quick look at the resources below. Your question might already be answered! 🌸

---

## 🗺️ Where Should I Ask?

Depending on what you need, there are different ways to reach out:

| If you want to...          | 🚀 This is the best place!                                                                    |
| :------------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Ask a general question** | Post a thread on our [💬 Community Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/worddevs/discussions) |
| **Read guides & docs**     | Explore our [📖 Documentation Wiki](https://github.com/worddevs/.github/wiki)                 |
| **Report a bug / issue**   | Open a [🐛 Bug Report](../issues/new?template=bug_report.md)                                  |
| **Suggest a cool idea**    | Request a [✨ Feature](../issues/new?template=feature_request.md)                             |
| **Report security bugs**   | Follow our [🔐 Security Policy](../blob/main/.github/SECURITY.md) (Private email)             |

---

## ❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### 🐾 Is Kannamy free to use?

Yes! Our core Discord bot projects are completely free and open source under the MIT license. You can host them yourself or use our official instances.

### 🔑 Where do I find my JWT/crypto keys for cf-keys?

Check out the configuration guide inside the `cf-keys` repository README. If you get stuck, feel free to ask in our Discussions!

### 🎨 Can I use kira-arts assets for my own projects?

Absolutely! As long as you respect the terms of the MIT License, you are free to customize and use the generator cards.

---

## 📧 Contact the Team

If none of the options above fit your needs, or if you need to discuss something private, you can always drop us a friendly email at:

👉 **[team@chocofactory.dev](mailto:team@chocofactory.dev)** 💌

We will do our best to reply to your inquiry as soon as possible!
